lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਅੰਕਸੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਆ ਭਾਈ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਚੂਕਾ ਭੇਖੁ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gur ankas jin naam drirraaeaa bhaaee man vasiaa chookaa bhekh |7|
lines.english: One who implants the Naam within himself, through the Guru's halter - O Siblings of Destiny, the Lord dwells in his mind, and he is free of hypocrisy. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਤਨੁ ਹਾਟੁ ਸਰਾਫ ਕੋ ਭਾਈ ਵਖਰੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: eihu tan haatt saraaf ko bhaaee vakhar naam apaar |
lines.english: This body is the jeweller's shop, O Siblings of Destiny; the incomparable Naam is the merchandise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਵਾਪਾਰੀ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਭਾਈ ਮੇਲਿ ਕਰੇ ਵਾਪਾਰੁ ॥੮॥੨॥
lines.translit: dhan vaapaaree naanakaa bhaaee mel kare vaapaar |8|2|
lines.english: Blessed is the merchant, O Nanak, who meets the Guru, and engages in this trade. ||8||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਵਖਰੁ ਵਾਪਾਰੀ ਸੋ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੈ ਭਾਈ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਕਰੇ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: eihu vakhar vaapaaree so drirrai bhaaee gur sabad kare veechaar |
lines.english: The merchant secures this merchandise, O Siblings of Destiny, by contemplating the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਤਿਨੑ ਕੇ ਸਾਥ ਤਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jinaee satigur seviaa piaare tina ke saath tare |
lines.english: Those who serve the True Guru, O Beloved, their companions are saved as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੂਡੇ ਭਾਰੇ ਭੈ ਬਿਨਾ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਤਾਰੇ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: boodde bhaare bhai binaa piaare taare nadar kare |1|
lines.english: Without the Fear of God, they are so heavy that they sink and drown, O Beloved; but the Lord, casting His Glance of Grace, carries them across. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨੑਾ ਠਾਕ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਰਸਨ ਹਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: tinaa tthaak na paaeeai piaare amrit rasan hare |
lines.english: No one blocks their way, O Beloved, and the Lord's Ambrosial Nectar is on their tongue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਬੋਹਿਥ ਭੈ ਡੁਬੀਐ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਕੰਧੀ ਪਾਇ ਕਹਾਹ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: vin bohith bhai ddubeeai piaare kandhee paae kahaah |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the boat, one is drowned in the sea of fear, O Beloved; how can I reach the distant shore? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੀ ਤੂਹੈ ਸਾਲਾਹਣਾ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਭੀ ਤੇਰੀ ਸਾਲਾਹ ॥
lines.translit: bhee toohai saalaahanaa piaare bhee teree saalaah |
lines.english: I ever praise You, O Beloved, I ever sing Your Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਾਲਾਹਨਿ ਸੇ ਭਲੇ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੇ ਰੰਗੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere prabh saalaahan se bhale piaare sabad rate rang hoe |
lines.english: Those who praise my God are good, O Beloved; they are imbued with the Word of the Shabad, and His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਸਾਲਾਹਣਾ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਦੂਜਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: saalaahee saalaahanaa piaare doojaa avar na koe |
lines.english: I praise the Praiseworthy Lord, O Beloved; there is no other one to praise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿ ਪਰਵਾਨਾ ਸਾਚ ਕਾ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਚਾ ਨੀਸਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: pat paravaanaa saach kaa piaare naam sachaa neesaan |
lines.english: The gateway to honor is Truth, O Beloved; it bears the Insignia of the True Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਜੇ ਮਿਲੈ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਰਸੁ ਲੈ ਤਤੁ ਵਿਲੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tis kee sangat je milai piaare ras lai tat viloe |2|
lines.english: If I join them, O Beloved, I can churn the essence and so find joy. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇਆ ਲਿਖਿ ਲੈ ਜਾਵਣਾ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਹੁਕਮੀ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਪਛਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: aaeaa likh lai jaavanaa piaare hukamee hukam pachhaan |
lines.english: We come into the world, and we depart, with our destiny written and pre-ordained, O Beloved; realize the Command of the Commander.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਬੂਝੀਐ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਸਾਚੇ ਸਾਚਾ ਤਾਣੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur bin hukam na boojheeai piaare saache saachaa taan |3|
lines.english: Without the Guru, this Command is not understood, O Beloved; True is the Power of the True Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਨਿੰਮਿਆ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਹੁਕਮੈ ਉਦਰ ਮਝਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: hukamai andar ninmiaa piaare hukamai udar majhaar |
lines.english: By His Command, we are conceived, O Beloved, and by His Command, we grow in the womb.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਜੰਮਿਆ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਊਧਉ ਸਿਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: hukamai andar jamiaa piaare aoodhau sir kai bhaar |
lines.english: By His Command, we are born, O Beloved, head-first, and upside-down.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਚਲੈ ਕਾਰਜ ਸਾਰਿ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: guramukh daragah jaaneeai piaare chalai kaaraj saar |4|
lines.english: The Gurmukh is honored in the Court of the Lord, O Beloved; he departs after resolving his affairs. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਆਇਆ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਜਾਦੋ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: hukamai andar aaeaa piaare hukame jaado jaae |
lines.english: By His Command, one comes into the world, O Beloved, and by His Will, he goes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਬੰਨੑਿ ਚਲਾਈਐ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਲਹੈ ਸਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: hukame bana chalaaeeai piaare manamukh lahai sajaae |
lines.english: By His Will, some are bound and gagged and driven away, O Beloved; the self-willed manmukhs suffer their punishment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਗਣਤ ਗਣਾਈਐ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਦੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: hukame ganat ganaaeeai piaare hukame haumai doe |
lines.english: By His Command, some accounts are accounted for, O Beloved; by His Command, some suffer in egotism and duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਣੀਐ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਦਰਗਹ ਪੈਧਾ ਜਾਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: hukame sabad pachhaaneeai piaare daragah paidhaa jaae |5|
lines.english: By His Command, the Word of the Shabad, is realized, O Beloved, and one goes to the Court of the Lord robed in honor. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਸਿਞਾਪੈ ਸਾਹ ਕਾ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਸਚੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਹੋਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: hukam siyaapai saah kaa piaare sach milai vaddiaaee hoe |6|
lines.english: If he comes to realize the Command of the Lord's Will, O Beloved, then he is blessed with Truth and Honor. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਭਵੈ ਭਵਾਈਐ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਅਵਗਣਿ ਮੁਠੀ ਰੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: hukame bhavai bhavaaeeai piaare avagan mutthee roe |
lines.english: By His Command, one wanders in reincarnation, O Beloved; deceived by sins and demerits, he cries out in his suffering.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑੀ ਸੋ ਸਾਲਾਹਿਆ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਹਉ ਤਿਨੑ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jinaee so saalaahiaa piaare hau tina balihaarai jaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who praise the Lord, O Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਖਣਿ ਅਉਖਾ ਆਖੀਐ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਕਿਉ ਸੁਣੀਐ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aakhan aaukhaa aakheeai piaare kiau suneeai sach naau |
lines.english: It is so difficult to speak it, O Beloved; how can we speak, and hear, the True Name?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਉ ਮਿਲੈ ਸੰਤੋਖੀਆਂ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਨਦਰੀ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਉ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: naau milai santokheean piaare nadaree mel milaau |7|
lines.english: I have obtained the Name, and I am satisfied, O Beloved; by His Grace, I am united in His Union. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਲਤਾ ਲੇਖਣਿ ਸਚ ਕੀ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਲਿਖਹੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: lalataa lekhan sach kee piaare har gun likhahu veechaar |
lines.english: and if my tongue became the pen, O Beloved, I would write, and contemplate, the Glorious Praises of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਕਾਗਦੁ ਜੇ ਥੀਐ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਮਨੁ ਮਸਵਾਣੀ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa kaagad je theeai piaare man masavaanee dhaar |
lines.english: If my body were to become the paper, O Beloved, and my mind the inkpot;

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਲੇਖਾਰੀ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਸਾਚੁ ਲਿਖੈ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਿ ॥੮॥੩॥
lines.translit: dhan lekhaaree naanakaa piaare saach likhai ur dhaar |8|3|
lines.english: Blessed is that scribe, O Nanak, who writes the True Name, and enshrines it within his heart. ||8||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਪਹਿਲਾ ਦੁਤੁਕੀ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 1 pahilaa dutukee |
lines.english: Sorat'h, First Mehl, Dho-Thukay:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਅਪਰਾਧੀ ਨਿਰਗੁਣੇ ਭਾਈ ਤੁਝ ਹੀ ਤੇ ਗੁਣੁ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ham aparaadhee niragune bhaaee tujh hee te gun soe |1|
lines.english: I am a worthless sinner, O Siblings of Destiny; virtue is obtained from You alone, Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਗੁਣਦਾਤੌ ਨਿਰਮਲੋ ਭਾਈ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਨਾ ਮਨੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: too gunadaatau niramalo bhaaee niramal naa man hoe |
lines.english: You are the Giver of virtue, O Immaculate Lord, but my mind is not immaculate, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਪਾਪੀ ਪਾਖੰਡੀਆ ਭਾਈ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਨਾਮ ਵਿਸੇਖੁ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hau paapee paakhanddeea bhaaee man tan naam visekh | rahaau |
lines.english: I am a hypocritical sinner, O Siblings of Destiny. Bless my mind and body with Your Name, O Lord. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮਾ ਤੂ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: mere preetamaa too karataa kar vekh |
lines.english: O my Beloved Creator Lord, You create, and You behold.
